title: Landing Page Conversion Audit Swipe File for Performance Marketers
description: Performance marketers use this annotated library of high-converting lead gen landing page structures — with breakdowns of headline formulas, form placement, and trust signal use — to diagnose and fix underperforming pages fast.
gumroad_description:
Your landing pages are bleeding leads because you can't spot what's actually killing conversions.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Performance marketers running lead gen campaigns who've hit a conversion plateau and need a framework to diagnose what's broken
— Demand gen managers building landing pages from scratch who don't want to guess at headline formulas or form field strategy
— Freelance conversion consultants who need client-ready examples to reference during optimization sprints

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 18 annotated high-converting page structures showing exactly where headlines, CTAs, and trust signals sit (and why)
— Headline formulas that qualify prospects while pulling clicks—not generic motivational copy
— Form placement patterns that actually match user intent at different stage funnels
— Trust signal strategies (social proof, credentials, guarantees) broken down by industry
— Copy-ready swipes in Markdown and JSON—plug directly into your tools or design briefs
— Usage notes explaining the principle behind each example so you adapt, not just copy

Stop rebuilding. Start auditing.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
